name: /rmatch starts rating-based matchmaking with initial window

payload.text:
Searching for opponent...
Rating: 1200
Rating window: ±100

name: mm:wait shows current search status with window

payload.text:
Still searching...
Rating: 1200
Rating window: ±100 (no expansions yet)
Elapsed: ~0s

name: mm:friend exits matchmaking and shows invite link

payload.text:
Matchmaking cancelled.

Share this link with a friend to play:
https://t.me/test_bot?start=invite1

name: mm:wait with no active session shows appropriate message

payload.text: No active matchmaking search. Use /rmatch to start.
